title: Automaticly pickup
description: Instant pickup your items/block after killing or breaking
body:
Some history:
I like auto-pickup mod by **Furgl**

but unfortunately there is (or did not find) another mod that it can
Although I found such datapacks as:
**Instant Pickup** - *by JustinTheBob*
**Better item pickup** - *by Fennecai*

So
This datapack means that after extracting/killing automaticly instant pickup items/blocks which drops

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

*its my first datapack i did for 1.20.1

</details>
